# text

Plain-text block type for the page editor. The first block type to exercise the
full editor pipeline end-to-end.

It is a thin renderer over the editor plugin's reusable `BlockTextEditor`
primitive, which owns the whole Lexical pipeline (value sync, structural
keyboard handling, slash menu, markdown shortcuts). The text block adds only its
`defineBlock` handle (`{ text }` payload, "Text" menu label) and a placeholder.
The bulleted-list block is the second consumer of the same primitive.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Plain-text block type for the page editor. Plain-text block type: registers its `data` schema at the server write boundary.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Editor.Block` "text" → `BlockTextRenderer`
  - Uses:
    - `page/editor.BlockTextRenderer`
    - `page/editor.Editor`
  - Exports (values): `textBlock`
- Server:
  - Contributes: `page.block-data` "text"
  - Uses: `page/editor.Editor`
- Core:
  - Uses:
    - `page/editor.defineBlock`
    - `page/editor.textDataSchema`
  - Exports (values): `textBlock`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
